release_notes: Telegram bot is now multilingual in all 7 interface languages — English, Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, Chinese, French, and German — switchable via /lang. Documentation refresh: the README is fully in English and now includes a System Requirements section (runs on 1 vCPU / 1 GB RAM / 20 GB SSD), and the project docs have been updated to the current version and feature set. Support contact updated to info@orbitra.link.
